title: SRS Discovery Contract (ext:discovery)
description: Defines DiscoveryQuery, TextSegment, and ConformanceScenario shapes for the ext:discovery extension (RFC-012).

DiscoveryQuery.description: A conjunction of zero or more structured filter predicates. An instance matches if and only if it satisfies all predicates whose values are specified (unspecified predicates are wildcards).

typeId.description: Exact match on Record.typeId. Only Tier 2 Records carry typeId; Tier 0/1 instances do not match this predicate.

typeNamespace.description: Exact match on Record.typeNamespace. Independent predicate; can be combined with typeId.

typeName.description: Exact match on Record.typeName. Independent predicate; can be combined with typeId.

containerId.description: Instance is a member of this container per RFC-009 I-66: (1) instanceId in Container.rootInstanceIds[], OR (2) instanceId in Container.memberInstanceIds[], OR (3) reachable via transitive contains Relation traversal from any rootInstanceIds[] entry.

tag.description: AND-conjunction: the instance's tags array must contain ALL of the specified values. RFC-006 vocabulary resolution is applied before comparison when a Vocabulary is declared.

lifecycleState.description: Exact match on Record.lifecycleState (case-sensitive). Requires ext:lifecycle. Instances without a lifecycleState field do not match.

excludeLifecycleStates.description: Exclusion filter (parity with the RFC-011 type-query axis of the same name): an instance whose Record.lifecycleState matches ANY listed value is excluded. Applied after lifecycleState. Lets an authored view declare default-hidden states (e.g. superseded, closed) while a client offers a runtime show-all override by passing an empty list. Requires ext:lifecycle; instances with no lifecycleState are never excluded by this axis.

tier.description: Instance tier filter. 0 = Note, 1 = TypedRecord, 2 = Record.

contentMatch.description: Free-text recall-floor predicate. The implementation MUST include every instance whose Text Projection contains at least one segment whose normalized text contains the normalized form of this string as a substring (NFC + Unicode simple lowercasing).

TextSegment.description: A single searchable unit in the Text Projection of an instance. Normalization (NFC + Unicode simple lowercasing) is applied at match time, not at segment construction time.

fieldId.description: UUID of the field definition for package-resolved fields; sentinel string for special segments: 'note-title', 'note-section', 'typed-record-title', 'typed-record-field', 'tag', 'label'.

fieldName.description: Field name (snake_case) for package-resolved fields; sentinel string for special segments matching fieldId sentinels; or TypedField.name / NoteSection.name for named special segments.

text.description: The raw stored text value. Normalization is applied at match time.

ConformanceScenario.description: A single named test scenario for the discovery conformance fixture.

query.description: The DiscoveryQuery to execute against the fixture repo.

expectedInstanceIds.description: Minimum required result set. For exactMatch:true scenarios, this is also the maximum.

exactMatch.description: If true, the result set MUST equal expectedInstanceIds exactly (structured-filter scenario). If false, the result set MUST be a superset of expectedInstanceIds (content-match scenario).
